title: Wonderfully Optimized
description: A performance and graphics focused modpack for Minecraft version 1.20.6.
body: Experience Minecraft like never before with the **Wonderfully Optimized** modpack. This carefully curated selection of mods is designed to optimize your gameplay, ensuring smooth and efficient performance even in the most demanding environments. Perfect for players who prioritize high frame rates and stability without sacrificing the core Minecraft experience.
